rescue_reason: CatBoostError: wrong focal loss syntax in working-tree modeling.py
failure_detail: modeling.py uses 'Logloss:focal_gamma=2.0' which is invalid for CatBoost 1.2.10. Additionally, Focal loss is not supported on GPU (only CPU). The comment in the same diff shows the correct syntax: 'Focal:focal_alpha=0.25;focal_gamma=2.0' with eval_metric='AUC'.

focal_loss_syntax_fix.description: Monkey-patch official.modeling.fit_catboost to use correct CatBoost 1.2.x focal loss syntax: 'Focal:focal_alpha=0.25;focal_gamma={gamma}' instead of 'Logloss:focal_gamma={gamma}'. Also disable GPU for CatBoost since Focal loss is not supported on GPU. These changes match the intent expressed in the inline code comment.
focal_loss_syntax_fix.eval_metric: AUC (unchanged - already correct in working tree)
focal_loss_syntax_fix.gpu_change: task_type GPU -> CPU for CatBoost (Focal not supported on GPU)
focal_loss_syntax_fix.semantic_impact: Enables focal loss training as designed. Using CPU instead of GPU for CatBoost (GPU would produce identical mathematical results if supported).

feature_parquet_dtype_fix.description: Cast 92 all-null object-dtype windowed feature columns to float64 before train stage.
feature_parquet_dtype_fix.semantic_impact: None - all-null columns provide zero information regardless of dtype.
